item.title: Threat Actor Groups Tracked by Palo Alto Networks Unit 42 (Updated Aug. 1, 2025)
item.author: Unit 42
item.content:encoded: A comprehensive list of threat actor groups tracked by Unit 42, along with information such as summaries and industries typically impacted.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, August 1st, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9552, (Fri, Aug 1st)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: Active Exploitation of Microsoft SharePoint Vulnerabilities: Threat Brief (Updated July 31)
item.author: Unit 42
item.content:encoded: Unit 42 has observed active exploitation of recent Microsoft SharePoint vulnerabilities. Here’s how you can protect your organization.

item.title: Scattered Spider Related Domain Names, (Thu, Jul 31st)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: This week, CISA updated its advisory on Scattered Spider. Scattered Spider is a threat actor using social engineering tricks to access target networks. The techniques used by Scattered Spider replicate those used by other successful actors, such as Lapsus$. Social engineering does not require a lot of technical tools; creativity is key, and defenses have a hard time keeping up with the techniques used by these threat actors.

item.title: Introducing Unit 42’s Attribution Framework
item.author: Andy Piazza, Kyle Wilhoit and Robert Falcone
item.content:encoded: Peel back the layers on Unit 42's Attribution Framework. We offer a rare inside view into the system used to ultimately assign attribution to threat groups.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Thursday, July 31st, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9550, (Thu, Jul 31st)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
